title: stelis hypsela
intro: Stelis hypsela, also known as the "Pine Butterfly Orchid", is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant contains various compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential candidate for wound healing and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Stelis hypsela have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, as well as to promote digestion and relieve stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, allowing its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized.
